name: Feature request
about: Propose a change to the harness (new agent, rule, installer option, docs)
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement

## The problem

<!-- What workflow is broken or missing today? Be concrete — "I tried X and Y happened". -->

## The proposal

<!-- What you'd like changed, in one paragraph. -->

## Why it belongs in the harness

This repo is deliberately small. Before proposing new content, confirm:

- [ ] It cannot be solved by configuring an existing agent or rule.
- [ ] It is useful to more than one project / language / team.
- [ ] It does not duplicate an existing agent's responsibility (see the delegation table in `CLAUDE.md`).
- [ ] If it's a new agent, it has a clear trigger condition that doesn't overlap with `code-reviewer` or `security-reviewer`.

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What you tried or looked at before filing this. -->

## Willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No — just flagging
